scope: Battle Command selected-frontline defender diagnosis cards with recommended direct rest/fallback commands

verified.notes: TypeScript and Vite production build passed after adding selected-frontline defender diagnosis recommended direct command buttons.

The selected-frontline panel derives defender diagnosis from existing selectedFrontlineDefenders and frontlineRotationStressScore, shows stress, morale, ammo, strength ratio, posture, target priority, anchor distance, warnings, and 推奨 維持/休息補給/後退守備, selects/scrolls to the clicked brigade, and routes 推奨実行/休息補給/後退守備 through existing issueOrQueueCommand paths without adding BattleState or save fields.

notVerified.reason: In-app browser localhost URL policy blocks the current http://127.0.0.1:5173/ QA path in this thread.
Mobile/cellphone QA is currently outside the active Takawasi target.

expectedManualFlow: Open Battle Command and select a frontline from the pressure strip or map.
Verify the selected-frontline panel shows 守備旅団診断 below 戦線提案.
Verify defender cards are sorted with the most stressed brigade first.
Verify each card shows stress, morale, ammo, strength ratio, posture, target priority, anchor distance, warning or 余力維持, and 推奨 維持/休息補給/後退守備 with a reason.
Click a defender card and verify that brigade becomes the selected unit and the viewport scrolls to its position.
Click 休息補給 with queue mode off and verify the defender receives the existing rest/resupply order.
Click 後退守備 with queue mode off and verify the defender receives the existing fallback-guard standing order.
Enable 予約指揮, click 休息補給 or 後退守備, and verify the selected defender command is queued with transmission preview.
Click 推奨実行 and verify it chooses 休息補給 for low ammo/fatigue/morale, 後退守備 for outside-control/very weak defenders, and disables for 推奨 維持.
Confirm the selected-brigade panel updates to the same unit, including 指揮コンパス and 担当戦線診断.
Confirm console error count is 0 and the defender cards do not overlap frontline command controls at desktop 1440px.
